name_en: 💕《Full Original Green Box Packaging》💕GG👉《Gucci Cosmogonie》series debuted at the historic Castello di Monte Castello in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and geographical locations complement each other, connecting the past and the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, presented in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Green soft leather, shiny gold-tone hardware, inside: 1 zip pocket, this bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fixed to the bag via a buckle, adjustable top handle strap with double-G magnetic snap.
